prs.title: Release: February 27, 2026 - Assessment Graph, AWS Marketplace Discovery & Portfolio Fixes
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Despite being a release bundle with heavy vendored/auto-gen content, the 3948 custom lines span AWS Marketplace discovery collectors, AI agent tooling updates, assessment graph work, portfolio query fixes, infra config, and extensive documentation — representing a major multi-feature release with architectural breadth.

prs.title: Assessment Features
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: 201 custom lines across AWS partner badge/tier collectors, assessment graph node components (GTM, IntegrationDepth, MaturityStage), entrypoint wiring, and type/schema definitions represent a solid, self-contained assessment feature addition with both backend data collection and frontend graph node work.

stories.name: Assessment Intelligence & Graph Capabilities
stories.rationale: Combined the assessment graph visualization, AI-powered assessment features, AWS Marketplace discovery integration, and portfolio fixes into a cohesive enhancement of the platform's core assessment and readiness evaluation capabilities.
